title: boehmeria arborea
intro: Boehmeria arborea, also known as rattan tree or false nettle, is a plant species in the nettle family native to tropical Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Boehmeria arborea include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating wounds, as well as offering antioxidant and anti-aging properties. Boehmeria arborea is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and poultices, and is also used to make traditional medicine and cosmetics.
